Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** **********************************************************

Ralph Matthes

August 2022

(** **********************************************************

Contents :

- constructs a displayed monoidal category that is displayed over the dialgebras, its total
  category is called the monoidal dialgebras

 ************************************************************)


Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Dialgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.WhiskeredDisplayedBifunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.Monoidal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.TotalMonoidal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.MonoidalSections.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.Symmetric.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.MonoidalFunctorLifting.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Structure.Symmetric.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.

Section FixTwoMonoidalFunctors.

  Import BifunctorNotations.
  Import MonoidalNotations.
  Import DisplayedBifunctorNotations.
  Import DisplayedMonoidalNotations.

  Context {A B : category}
          {V : monoidal A} {W : monoidal B}
          {F G : A ⟶ B}
          (Fm : fmonoidal V W F) (Gm : fmonoidal_lax V W G).
  (** it is expected that [Fm] could just be an oplax monoidal functor *)

  Local Definition base_disp : disp_cat A := dialgebra_disp_cat F G.

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: base_disp x
yy: base_disp y
isaprop (xx -->[ f] yy)

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: base_disp x
yy: base_disp y
isaprop (xx -->[ f] yy)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
x, y: A
f: A ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: base_disp x
yy: base_disp y
Hyp, Hyp': xx -->[ f] yy
isofhlevel 0 (Hyp = Hyp')

    apply B.
  Qed.

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': A
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a'
base_disp (a ⊗_{ V} a')

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': A
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a'
base_disp (a ⊗_{ V} a')

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': A
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a'
B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'), G a ⊗_{ W} G a' ⟧

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': A
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a'
B ⟦ F a ⊗_{ W} F a', G a ⊗_{ W} G a' ⟧

    exact (f ⊗^{W} f').
  Defined.

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
f' -->[ h'] g'
→ dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f' -->[
  a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h'] dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f g'

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
f' -->[ h'] g'
→ dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f' -->[
  a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h'] dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' -->[ h'] g'
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f' -->[
a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h'] dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f' -->[
a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h'] dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f'
· (# G)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h') =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f g'
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· f ⊗^{ W} f' · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2
· (# G)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h') =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
   · f ⊗^{ W} g'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2')

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· f ⊗^{ W} f' · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2
· (# G)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h') = ?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
?b =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
   · f ⊗^{ W} g'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2')

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· f ⊗^{ W} f' · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2
· (# G)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h') = ?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· (f ⊗^{ W} f'
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2
      · (# G)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h'))) = ?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2
· (# G)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h') = ?t2
 apply pathsinv0, fmonoidal_preservestensornatleft. 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· (f ⊗^{ W} f'
   · (G a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h'
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2')) =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
   · f ⊗^{ W} g'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2')

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· f ⊗^{ W} f' · G a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· f ⊗^{ W} g' · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a2'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· f ⊗^{ W} f' · G a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· f ⊗^{ W} g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· f ⊗^{ W} f' · G a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' = ?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
?b =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· f ⊗^{ W} g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· f ⊗^{ W} f' · G a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' = ?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· functoronmorphisms2 W f f'
· G a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' = ?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· (F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · f ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a2)
· G a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' = ?b

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· (F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f'
   · (f ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a2 · G a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h')) =
?b

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
f ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a2 · G a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' = ?t2

      apply (bifunctor_equalwhiskers W). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· (F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f'
   · functoronmorphisms2 W f ((# G)%cat h')) =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· f ⊗^{ W} g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· (F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f'
   · functoronmorphisms2 W f ((# G)%cat h')) =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· functoronmorphisms2 W f g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· (F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f'
   · (F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' · f ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a2')) =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· (F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} g' · f ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a2')

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h'
· f ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a2' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} g' · f ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a2'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
aux: F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# F)%cat h'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2' =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2
· (# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
aux: inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· (F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# F)%cat h'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2') =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
aux: inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# F)%cat h'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
aux: (# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h') =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# F)%cat h'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} g'

f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
aux: inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# F)%cat h' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· inv_from_z_iso
    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2',,
     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' =
(# F)%cat (a ⊗^{ V}_{l} h')
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2')
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} g'

pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' = 
?b

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· (F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h') =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a2,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a2)
· (F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# F)%cat h' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} g')

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# G)%cat h' =
F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (# F)%cat h' · F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} g'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f' · (# G)%cat h') =
F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} ((# F)%cat h' · g')

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a2, a2': A
h': A ⟦ a2, a2' ⟧
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a2
g': base_disp a2'
Hyp': f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'
f' · (# G)%cat h' = (# F)%cat h' · g'

    exact Hyp'.
  Qed.

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
f -->[ h] g
→ dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f' -->[
  h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a] dialgebra_disp_tensor_op g f'

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G

f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
f -->[ h] g
→ dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f' -->[
  h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a] dialgebra_disp_tensor_op g f'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f -->[ h] g
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f' -->[
h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a] dialgebra_disp_tensor_op g f'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f' -->[
h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a] dialgebra_disp_tensor_op g f'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f'
· (# G)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a) =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op g f'
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· f ⊗^{ W} f' · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a
· (# G)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a) =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
   · g ⊗^{ W} f'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1' a)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· f ⊗^{ W} f' · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a
· (# G)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a) = ?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
?b =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
   · g ⊗^{ W} f'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1' a)

· f ⊗^{ W} f' · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a

pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· (f ⊗^{ W} f'
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a
· (# G)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a) = ?t2
 apply pathsinv0, fmonoidal_preservestensornatright. 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· (f ⊗^{ W} f'
   · ((# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1' a)) =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
   · g ⊗^{ W} f'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1' a)

f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'

pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· f ⊗^{ W} f' · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1' a =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
· g ⊗^{ W} f' · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1' a

· f ⊗^{ W} f' · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a =

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a = ?t2

      apply pathsinv0, (bifunctor_equalwhiskers W). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· (f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W} f') =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
· g ⊗^{ W} f'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· (f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a
   · ((# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · G a1' ⊗^{ W}_{l} f')) =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
· (g ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · G a1' ⊗^{ W}_{l} f')

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a
· G a1' ⊗^{ W}_{l} f' =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
· g ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · G a1' ⊗^{ W}_{l} f'

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
· g ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
aux: (# F)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1' a =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a · (# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
· g ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
aux: inv_from_z_iso
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· ((# F)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1' a) =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
· g ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G

f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
aux: inv_from_z_iso
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a) · (# F)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1' a = (# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a =
(# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
· g ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a

aux: (# F)%cat (h ⊗^{ V}_{r} a) =
inv_from_z_iso
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a,,

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧

f': base_disp a

aux: inv_from_z_iso

fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a) · (# F)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a =

· inv_from_z_iso
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1' a,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1' a)
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a =

  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a,,

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· (# F)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · g ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· (f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a)
· ((# F)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · g ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
f ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · (# G)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a =
(# F)%cat h ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a · g ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
(f · (# G)%cat h) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a =
((# F)%cat h · g) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a1', a: A
h: A ⟦ a1, a1' ⟧
f: base_disp a1
f': base_disp a
g: base_disp a1'
Hyp: f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g
f · (# G)%cat h = (# F)%cat h · g

    exact Hyp.
  Qed.

  (** the following "morally right" formulation does not follow the division into the two whiskerings
  Lemma dialgebra_disp_tensor_comp_aux {a1 a2 a1' a2' : A} {h: a1 --> a1'} {h': a2 --> a2'}
    (f : base_disp a1) (f' : base_disp a2) (g : base_disp a1') (g' : base_disp a2')
    : f -->[h] g -> f'-->[h'] g' -> dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f' -->[h ⊗^{V} h'] dialgebra_disp_tensor_op g g'.
  Proof.
    intros Hyp Hyp'.
    hnf in Hyp, Hyp' |- *.
    unfold dialgebra_disp_tensor_op.
    *)

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
disp_tensor base_disp V

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
disp_tensor base_disp V

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
locally_propositional base_disp
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
disp_bifunctor_data V base_disp base_disp base_disp

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
locally_propositional base_disp
 apply is_locally_propositional_dialgebra_disp_cat.
    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
disp_bifunctor_data V base_disp base_disp base_disp
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
∏ x y : A,
base_disp x → base_disp y → base_disp (x ⊗_{ V} y)
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
∏ (x y1 y2 : A) (g : A ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧) (xx : base_disp x)
(yy1 : base_disp y1) (yy2 : base_disp y2),
yy1 -->[ g] yy2
→ ?Fob x y1 xx yy1 -->[
  x ⊗^{ V}_{l} g] ?Fob x y2 xx yy2
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
∏ (x1 x2 y : A) (f : A ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(xx1 : base_disp x1) (xx2 : base_disp x2)
(yy : base_disp y),
xx1 -->[ f] xx2
→ ?Fob x1 y xx1 yy -->[
  f ⊗^{ V}_{r} y] ?Fob x2 y xx2 yy

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
∏ x y : A,
base_disp x → base_disp y → base_disp (x ⊗_{ V} y)
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': A
f: base_disp a
f': base_disp a'
base_disp (a ⊗_{ V} a')
 exact (dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f').
      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
∏ (x y1 y2 : A) (g : A ⟦ y1, y2 ⟧) (xx : base_disp x)
(yy1 : base_disp y1) (yy2 : base_disp y2),
yy1 -->[ g] yy2
→ (λ (a a' : A) (f : base_disp a) (f' : base_disp a'),
   dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f') x y1 xx yy1 -->[
  x ⊗^{ V}_{l} g] (λ (a a' : A) (f : base_disp a)
                   (f' : base_disp a'),
                   dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f f') x y2
                    xx yy2
 intros; apply dialgebra_disp_tensor_comp_aux1; assumption.
      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
∏ (x1 x2 y : A) (f : A ⟦ x1, x2 ⟧)
(xx1 : base_disp x1) (xx2 : base_disp x2)
(yy : base_disp y),
xx1 -->[ f] xx2
→ (λ (a a' : A) (f0 : base_disp a)
   (f' : base_disp a'), dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f0 f')
    x1 y xx1 yy -->[
  f ⊗^{ V}_{r} y] (λ (a a' : A) (f0 : base_disp a)
                   (f' : base_disp a'),
                   dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f0 f') x2
                    y xx2 yy
 intros; apply dialgebra_disp_tensor_comp_aux2; assumption.
  Defined.

  Definition dialgebra_disp_unit: base_disp I_{ V}
    := pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm.

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
disp_leftunitor_data dialgebra_disp_tensor
  dialgebra_disp_unit

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
disp_leftunitor_data dialgebra_disp_tensor
  dialgebra_disp_unit

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
dialgebra_disp_unit ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_tensor} f -->[
lu^{ V }_{ a}] f

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op dialgebra_disp_unit f
· (# G)%cat lu^{ V }_{ a} =
(# F)%cat lu^{ V }_{ a} · f
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ V} a)
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
   · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm) ⊗^{ W} f
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm I_{ V} a
· (# G)%cat lu^{ V }_{ a} =
(# F)%cat lu^{ V }_{ a} · f

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ V} a)
· functoronmorphisms2 W
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
     · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm) f
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm I_{ V} a
· (# G)%cat lu^{ V }_{ a} =
(# F)%cat lu^{ V }_{ a} · f
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm I_{ V} a)
· (F I_{ V} ⊗^{ W}_{l} f
   · (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
      · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm I_{ V} a
· (# G)%cat lu^{ V }_{ a} =
(# F)%cat lu^{ V }_{ a} · f

   · (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
      ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a
      · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm I_{ V} a
· (# G)%cat lu^{ V }_{ a} =
(# F)%cat lu^{ V }_{ a} · f

a: A
f: base_disp a
identity (F I_{ V} ⊗_{ W} F a)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm I_{ V} a =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm I_{ V} a

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G

  dialgebra_disp_unit

W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
F a
⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
            · fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a I_{ V} = ?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
?b = fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a I_{ V}

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
F a
⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
            · fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a I_{ V} = ?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
F a
⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
            · fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm) = ?f'

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm = ?t2

      apply  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (_,,fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
F a ⊗^{ W}_{l} identity (F I_{ V})
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a I_{ V} =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a I_{ V}

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a: A
f: base_disp a
identity (F a ⊗_{ W} F I_{ V})
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a I_{ V} =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a I_{ V}

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
disp_associator_data dialgebra_disp_tensor

  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
disp_associator_data dialgebra_disp_tensor

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
(f1 ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_tensor} f2)
⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_tensor} f3 -->[
α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}] f1
                       ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_tensor} 
                       (f2
                        ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_tensor} f3)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op
  (dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f1 f2) f3
· (# G)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3} =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f1
    (dialgebra_disp_tensor_op f2 f3)
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W} f3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· (# G)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3} =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
        (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
   · f1
     ⊗^{ W} (pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3) · f2 ⊗^{ W} f3
             · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W} f3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· (# G)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3} = ?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
?b =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
        (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
   · f1
     ⊗^{ W} (pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3) · f2 ⊗^{ W} f3
             · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G

f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W} f3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· (# G)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3} = ?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· functoronmorphisms2 W
    (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
     · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2
     · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a2) f3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· (# G)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3} = ?b

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
   · (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
      · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a2)
     ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· (# G)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3} = ?b

W: monoidal B

pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
   · ((pr1
         (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
       · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
      · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a2
        ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· (# G)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3} = ?b

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
   · ((pr1
         (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
       · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
      · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a2
         ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
         · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm
              (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
            · (# G)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3})))) = 
?b

f3: base_disp a3

· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
   · (# G)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}) = ?t2

f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· (# G)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3} = ?t2

      apply fmonoidal_preservesassociativity. 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
   · ((pr1
         (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
       · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
      · (α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3}
         · G a1
           ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm
                        a2 a3
         · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1
             (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))) =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
        (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
   · f1
     ⊗^{ W} (pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3) · f2 ⊗^{ W} f3
             · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3)
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3}
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3) =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1
  ⊗^{ W} (pr1
            (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2
               a3) · f2 ⊗^{ W} f3
          · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a1 (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3}
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3 =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1
  ⊗^{ W} (pr1
            (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2
               a3) · f2 ⊗^{ W} f3
          · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3)

W: monoidal B

pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3}
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3 =
?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
?b =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1
  ⊗^{ W} (pr1

W: monoidal B

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G

f3: base_disp a3
?b =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1
  ⊗^{ W} (pr1

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
?b =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
   · G a1
     ⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      Fm a2 a3) · f2 ⊗^{ W} f3
                 · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2
                     a3))

         
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
?b =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
   · (G a1
      ⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       Fm a2 a3) · f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)
      · G a1
        ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2
                     a3))

         apply idpath. 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3}
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3 =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
   · (G a1
      ⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       Fm a2 a3) · f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)
      · G a1
        ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2
                     a3))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3}
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3 =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1
                (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                   a2 a3) · f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a2 a3

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3} =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1
                (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                   a2 a3) · f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   · f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3} =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· (G a1
   ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                   a2 a3)
   · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3 · (f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3)
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3} =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· (G a1
   ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                   a2 a3)
   · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3 · (f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3)
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3} = ?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
?b =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· (G a1
   ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                   a2 a3)
   · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3 · (f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3)
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3} = ?b

  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3) · F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3 · (f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3) =
?f'

A, B: category

F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
  ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3 = ?t2

      apply pathsinv0, bifunctor_equalwhiskers. 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
  ⊗^{ W} f3 · (f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3} =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· (G a1
   ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                   a2 a3)
   · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3 · (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3)
· (f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3} =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· (G a1
   ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                   a2 a3)
   · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
     a3)
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
   · ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
      · ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
         · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3}))) =
(# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
        (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
   · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
      · (G a1
         ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                         Fm a2 a3)
         · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3))))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
   · ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
      · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})) =
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3,,
 fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)
   a3)
· ((# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
   · (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
           (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
      · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
         · (G a1
            ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                            Fm a2 a3)
            · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)))))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
   · ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
      · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· ((# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
   · (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
           (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
      · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
         · (G a1
            ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                            Fm a2 a3)
            · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)))))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
z_iso (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
  ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
aux1:= ?Goal: z_iso (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
  ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
   · ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
      · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· ((# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
   · (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
           (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
      · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
         · (G a1
            ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                            Fm a2 a3)
            · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)))))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
z_iso (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
  ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
   ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2
   ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2
  ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3 =
identity (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)

identity ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)

identity (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3 =
identity (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)

        apply (bifunctor_rightid W).

f3: base_disp a3
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2) =
?t2

          apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_,,fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
identity (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3 =
identity ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)

        apply (bifunctor_rightid W).
    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
aux1:= pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3,,
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3,,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧)
((pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(λ p : B ⟦ F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧,
p = identity (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(maponpaths
(rightwhiskering_on_morphisms W (F a3) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2))
(F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)))
(z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)) @
bifunctor_rightid W (F a3) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)))
(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(bifunctor_rightcomp W (F a3) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2)
(F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)) (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2))
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2)),,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧)
((fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(λ p : B ⟦ (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧,
p = identity ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(maponpaths
(rightwhiskering_on_morphisms W (F a3) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2)
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2))
(z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)) @
bifunctor_rightid W (F a3) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2))
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(bifunctor_rightcomp W (F a3) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2))
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2)
(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2))): z_iso (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
  ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
   · ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
      · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})) =
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· ((# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
   · (pr1
        (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
           (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
      · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
         · (G a1
            ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                            Fm a2 a3)
            · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)))))

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
aux1:= pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3,,
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3,,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧)
((pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(λ p : B ⟦ F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧,
p = identity (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(maponpaths
(rightwhiskering_on_morphisms W (F a3) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2))
(F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)))
(z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)) @
bifunctor_rightid W (F a3) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)))
(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(bifunctor_rightcomp W (F a3) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2)
(F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)) (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2))
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2)),,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧)
((fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(λ p : B ⟦ (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧,
p = identity ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(maponpaths
(rightwhiskering_on_morphisms W (F a3) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2)
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2))
(z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)) @
bifunctor_rightid W (F a3) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2))
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(bifunctor_rightcomp W (F a3) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2))
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2)
(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2))): z_iso (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
  ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
inv_from_z_iso aux1
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
   · ((# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
      · (pr1
           (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
              (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
         · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
            · (G a1
               ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                            (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                               Fm a2 a3)
               · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)))))) =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
   · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
aux1:= pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3,,
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3,,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧)
((pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(λ p : B ⟦ F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧,
p = identity (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(maponpaths
(rightwhiskering_on_morphisms W (F a3) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2))
(F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)))
(z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)) @
bifunctor_rightid W (F a3) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)))
(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(bifunctor_rightcomp W (F a3) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2)
(F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2)) (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2))
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2)),,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧)
((fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(λ p : B ⟦ (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3, (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3 ⟧,
p = identity ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(maponpaths
(rightwhiskering_on_morphisms W (F a3) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2)
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2))
(z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2)) @
bifunctor_rightid W (F a3) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2))
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3)
(bifunctor_rightcomp W (F a3) (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2))
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2)
(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 a2))): z_iso (F (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
  ((F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗_{ W} F a3)
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
   · ((# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
      · (pr1
           (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
              (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
         · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
            · (G a1
               ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                            (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                               Fm a2 a3)
               · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)))))) =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
   · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
   · ((# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
      · (pr1
           (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
              (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
         · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
            · (G a1
               ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                            (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                               Fm a2 a3)
               · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)))))) =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
   · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
   · ((# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
      · (pr1
           (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
              (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
         · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
            · (G a1
               ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                            (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                               Fm a2 a3)
               · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)))))) =
?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
?b =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
   · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
   · ((# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
      · (pr1
           (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
              (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
         · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
            · (G a1
               ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                            (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                               Fm a2 a3)
               · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)))))) =
?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· (# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3}
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) = ?b

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 a2 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (a1 ⊗_{ V} a2) a3
· (# F)%cat α^{ V }_{ a1, a2, a3} = ?f'

      apply fmonoidal_preservesassociativity. 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· F a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
   · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· F a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) = ?b

W: monoidal B

f3: base_disp a3

· ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
   · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})

W: monoidal B

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A

f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· F a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) = ?b

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2

α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· F a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) = ?b

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· F a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)) = ?f'

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· (F a1
   ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1
        (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
      · pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
             (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))) = ?f'

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a1 (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· pr1
    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1
       (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)) = ?t2

      apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_,,fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a1 _)). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· (F a1
   ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
   · identity (F a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
   · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· F a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
   · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· F a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) = ?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
?b =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
   · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})

f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
?b =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· ((f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
   · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3})

W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
?b =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
· α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3}
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
?f =
(F a1 ⊗_{ W} F a2) ⊗^{ W}_{l} f3
· (f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W}_{r} G a3
 apply (bifunctor_equalwhiskers W). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· F a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) =
(f1 ⊗^{ W} f2) ⊗^{ W} f3 · α^{ W }_{ G a1, G a2, G a3}

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· F a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) =
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3} · f1 ⊗^{ W} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3}
· (F a1
   ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
   · (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
      · (G a1
         ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                         Fm a2 a3)
         · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)))) =
α^{ W }_{ F a1, F a2, F a3} · f1 ⊗^{ W} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
F a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
   · (G a1
      ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      Fm a2 a3)
      · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3))) =
f1 ⊗^{ W} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
F a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· (f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
   · (G a1
      ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      Fm a2 a3)
      · G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3))) =
f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)

f3: base_disp a3
F a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3) =
f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} (f2 ⊗^{ W} f3)

z_iso (G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
  (G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))

aux2:= ?Goal: z_iso (G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
  (G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))
F a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3) =
f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)

is_z_isomorphism

is_inverse_in_precat
  (G a1

G a1
⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1

· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3 =
identity (G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} identity (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)) =
identity (G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))

        apply (bifunctor_leftid W).
