A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
aux2:= G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3),,
G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3,,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3) ⟧)
(G a1
⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3))
(λ p : B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3) ⟧,
p = identity (G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))
(maponpaths
(leftwhiskering_on_morphisms W (G a1) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
(F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))
(z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)) @
bifunctor_leftid W (G a1) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))
(G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3)
(bifunctor_leftcomp W (G a1) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)
(F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)) (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3))
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3)),,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) ⟧)
(G a1
⊗^{ W}_{l} (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)))
(λ p : B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) ⟧,
p = identity (G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)))
(maponpaths
(leftwhiskering_on_morphisms W (G a1) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)
(F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)) @
bifunctor_leftid W (G a1) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3))
(bifunctor_leftcomp W (G a1) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
(F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3)
(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3))): z_iso (G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
  (G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))
F a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1
               (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                  a2 a3) =
f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
aux2:= G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3),,
G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3,,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3) ⟧)
(G a1
⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3))
(λ p : B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3) ⟧,
p = identity (G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))
(maponpaths
(leftwhiskering_on_morphisms W (G a1) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
(F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))
(z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)) @
bifunctor_leftid W (G a1) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))
(G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3)
(bifunctor_leftcomp W (G a1) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)
(F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)) (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3))
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3)),,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) ⟧)
(G a1
⊗^{ W}_{l} (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)))
(λ p : B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) ⟧,
p = identity (G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)))
(maponpaths
(leftwhiskering_on_morphisms W (G a1) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)
(F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)) @
bifunctor_leftid W (G a1) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3))
(bifunctor_leftcomp W (G a1) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
(F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3)
(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3))): z_iso (G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
  (G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))
F a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3) =
f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) · inv_from_z_iso aux2

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
aux2:= G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3),,
G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3,,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3) ⟧)
(G a1
⊗^{ W}_{l} (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3))
(λ p : B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3) ⟧,
p = identity (G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))
(maponpaths
(leftwhiskering_on_morphisms W (G a1) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
(F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))
(z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)) @
bifunctor_leftid W (G a1) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)))
(G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3)
(bifunctor_leftcomp W (G a1) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)
(F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3)) (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3))
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3)),,
internal_paths_rew
(B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) ⟧)
(G a1
⊗^{ W}_{l} (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)))
(λ p : B ⟦ G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3), G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) ⟧,
p = identity (G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)))
(maponpaths
(leftwhiskering_on_morphisms W (G a1) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)
(F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
(fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3,,
fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3)) @
bifunctor_leftid W (G a1) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))
(G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· G a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3))
(bifunctor_leftcomp W (G a1) (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) (F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
(F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3) (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3)
(pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a2 a3))): z_iso (G a1 ⊗_{ W} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3))
  (G a1 ⊗_{ W} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3))
F a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3) =
f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a1, a2, a3: A
f1: base_disp a1
f2: base_disp a2
f3: base_disp a3
F a1 ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3
· f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} F (a2 ⊗_{ V} a3) =
f1 ⊗^{ W}_{r} (F a2 ⊗_{ W} F a3)
· G a1
  ⊗^{ W}_{l} fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a2 a3

    apply pathsinv0, (bifunctor_equalwhiskers W).
  Qed.

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
disp_monoidal_data base_disp V
 exact dialgebra_disp_monoidal_data.
  Defined.

  Definition dialgebra_monoidal : monoidal (dialgebra F G) := total_monoidal dialgebra_disp_monoidal.

  Definition dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 : fmonoidal dialgebra_monoidal V (dialgebra_pr1 F G)
    := projection_fmonoidal dialgebra_disp_monoidal.

  Section IntoMonoidalSection.

    Context (α : F ⟹ G) (ismnt : is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α).

    Let ismnt_tensor : is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α := pr1 ismnt.
    Let ismnt_unit : is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α := pr2 ismnt.

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (nat_trans_to_section F G α)

ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α

  (nat_trans_to_section F G α)

  dialgebra_disp_monoidal (nat_trans_to_section F G α)

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
nat_trans_to_section F G α a
⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} nat_trans_to_section F G
                                α a' -->[
identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')] nat_trans_to_section F G α
                          (a ⊗_{ V} a')

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G

ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (α a) (α a')
· (# G)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) =
(# F)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) · α (a ⊗_{ V} a')
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B

ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
· α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'
· (# G)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) =
(# F)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) · α (a ⊗_{ V} a')

W: monoidal B

ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
· α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'
· identity (G (a ⊗_{ V} a')) =
identity (F (a ⊗_{ V} a')) · α (a ⊗_{ V} a')

· α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' =

a, a': A
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
   · α (a ⊗_{ V} a')) = α (a ⊗_{ V} a')

W: monoidal B

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α

pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· α (a ⊗_{ V} a') = α (a ⊗_{ V} a')

pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· α (a ⊗_{ V} a') = ?b

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

identity (F (a ⊗_{ V} a')) · α (a ⊗_{ V} a') =

section_preserves_unit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (nat_trans_to_section F G α)

· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· (# G)%cat (identity I_{ V}) =

· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm · identity (G I_{ V}) =
identity (F I_{ V}) · α I_{ V}

· fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm = ?f'

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B

ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
identity (F I_{ V}) · α I_{ V} = α I_{ V}

        apply id_left.
    Qed.

smonoidal_laxlaws V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data

ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α

  monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data

      repeat split; red; intros; apply base_disp_cells_isaprop.
    Qed.

  (smonoidal_preserves_tensor V
     dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data)

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
  (smonoidal_preserves_tensor V
     dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data a a')

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a') -->[
inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso (a ⊗_{ V} a'))] nat_trans_to_section
                                                 F G α
                                                 a
                                               ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} 
                                               nat_trans_to_section
                                                 F G α
                                                 a'
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
(λ gg : nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a') -->[
        inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso (a ⊗_{ V} a'))] 
        nat_trans_to_section F G α a
        ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} 
        nat_trans_to_section F G α a',
 gg ;; smonoidal_preserves_tensor V
         dialgebra_disp_monoidal
         monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data a a' =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
      (nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
   (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
      (identity_z_iso (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
   (id_disp (nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
 × smonoidal_preserves_tensor V
     dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data a a' ;; gg =
   transportb
     (mor_disp
        (nat_trans_to_section F G α a
         ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} 
         nat_trans_to_section F G α a')
        (nat_trans_to_section F G α a
         ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} 
         nat_trans_to_section F G α a'))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
     (id_disp
        (nat_trans_to_section F G α a
         ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} 
         nat_trans_to_section F G α a'))) 
  ?pr1

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a') -->[
inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso (a ⊗_{ V} a'))] nat_trans_to_section
                                                 F G α
                                                 a
                                               ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} 
                                               nat_trans_to_section
                                                 F G α
                                                 a'
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G

ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
α (a ⊗_{ V} a') · (# G)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) =
(# F)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (α a) (α a')
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G

ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
α (a ⊗_{ V} a') · (# G)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) =
(# F)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
   · α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a')
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
(# F)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
   · α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a') =
α (a ⊗_{ V} a') · (# G)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a'))

        (* now as for [monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data] *)

   · α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a') =
α (a ⊗_{ V} a') · identity (G (a ⊗_{ V} a'))

pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· α (a ⊗_{ V} a') = ?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a' = ?f'

          apply (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (_,,fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')).
        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
identity (F (a ⊗_{ V} a')) · α (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
α (a ⊗_{ V} a')

        apply id_left.
      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
a, a': A
(λ gg : nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a') -->[
        inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso (a ⊗_{ V} a'))] 
        nat_trans_to_section F G α a
        ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} nat_trans_to_section
                                        F G α a',
 gg ;; smonoidal_preserves_tensor V
         dialgebra_disp_monoidal
         monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data a a' =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
      (nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
   (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
      (identity_z_iso (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
   (id_disp (nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
 × smonoidal_preserves_tensor V
     dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data a a' ;; gg =
   transportb
     (mor_disp
        (nat_trans_to_section F G α a
         ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} nat_trans_to_section
                                         F G α a')
        (nat_trans_to_section F G α a
         ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} nat_trans_to_section
                                         F G α a'))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (identity_z_iso (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
     (id_disp
        (nat_trans_to_section F G α a
         ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} nat_trans_to_section
                                         F G α a')))
  ((! internal_paths_rew_r
        (B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'), F (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧)
        ((# F)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
        (identity (F (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
        (λ p : B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'), F (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧,
         p
         · (pr1
              (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a
                 a') · α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
            · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a') =
         α (a ⊗_{ V} a')
         · (# G)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
        (internal_paths_rew_r
           (B ⟦ G (a ⊗_{ V} a'), G (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧)
           ((# G)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
           (identity (G (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
           (λ p : B ⟦ G (a ⊗_{ V} a'), G (a ⊗_{ V} a')
                  ⟧,
            identity (F (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
            · (pr1
                 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                    a a') · α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
               · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a') =
            α (a ⊗_{ V} a') · p)
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'), G (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧)
              (identity (F (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
               · (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       Fm a a') · α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
                  · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a
                      a'))
              (pr1
                 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                    a a') · α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
               · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a')
              (λ p : B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'),
                     G (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧,
               p =
               α (a ⊗_{ V} a')
               · identity (G (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'), G (a ⊗_{ V} a')
                  ⟧)
                 (α (a ⊗_{ V} a')
                  · identity (G (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
                 (α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
                 (λ p : B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'),
                        G (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧,
                  pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       Fm a a') · α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
                  · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a
                      a' = p)
                 (internal_paths_rew_r
                    (B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'),
                     G (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧)
                    (pr1
                       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                          Fm a a') · α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
                     · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         Gm a a')
                    (pr1
                       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                          Fm a a')
                     · (α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
                        · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            Gm a a'))
                    (λ p : B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'),
                           G (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧,
                     p = α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
                    (internal_paths_rew
                       (B ⟦ F a ⊗_{ W} F a',
                        G (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧)
                       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                          Fm a a' · α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
                       (λ p : B ⟦ F a ⊗_{ W} F a',
                              G (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧,
                        pr1
                          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                             Fm a a') · p =
                        α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
                       (internal_paths_rew_r
                          (B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'),
                           G (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧)
                          (pr1
                             (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                Fm a a')
                           · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                Fm a a'
                              · α (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
                          (pr1
                             (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                Fm a a')
                           · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                               Fm a a'
                           · α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
                          (λ p : B ⟦ F (a ⊗_{ V} a'),
                                 G (a ⊗_{ V} a') ⟧,
                           p = α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
                          (cancel_postcomposition
                             (pr1
                                (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                   Fm a a')
                              · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                  Fm a a')
                             (identity
                                (F (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
                             (α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
                             (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                                (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                   Fm a a',,
                                 fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                   Fm a a')) @
                           id_left (α (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
                          (assoc
                             (pr1
                                (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                                   Fm a a'))
                             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                                Fm a a')
                             (α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))))
                       (α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
                        · fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            Gm a a')
                       (ismnt_tensor a a'))
                    (assoc'
                       (pr1
                          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                             Fm a a'))
                       (α a ⊗^{ W} α a')
                       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                          Gm a a')))
                 (id_right (α (a ⊗_{ V} a'))))
              (id_left
                 (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       Fm a a') · α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
                  · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a
                      a')))
           (functor_id G (a ⊗_{ V} a')))
        (functor_id F (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
    :
    α (a ⊗_{ V} a')
    · (# G)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) =
    (# F)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a'))
    · dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (α a) (α a'))
   :
   nat_trans_to_section F G α (a ⊗_{ V} a') -->[
   inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso (a ⊗_{ V} a'))] 
   nat_trans_to_section F G α a
   ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} nat_trans_to_section
                                   F G α a')
 split; apply base_disp_cells_isaprop.
    Qed.

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal_strongunit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (smonoidal_preserves_unit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal_strongunit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (smonoidal_preserves_unit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data)

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V} -->[
inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso I_{ V})] dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal}
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
(λ gg : nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V} -->[
        inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso I_{ V})] dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal},
 gg ;; smonoidal_preserves_unit V
         dialgebra_disp_monoidal
         monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data =
 transportb
   (mor_disp (nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V})
      (nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V}))
   (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso I_{ V}))
   (id_disp (nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V}))
 × smonoidal_preserves_unit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data ;; gg =
   transportb
     (mor_disp dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal}
        dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal})
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso I_{ V}))
     (id_disp dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal})) 
  ?pr1

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V} -->[
inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso I_{ V})] dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal}
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
α I_{ V} · (# G)%cat (identity I_{ V}) =
(# F)%cat (identity I_{ V}) · dialgebra_disp_unit
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
α I_{ V} · (# G)%cat (identity I_{ V}) =
(# F)%cat (identity I_{ V})
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
   · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm)

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
α I_{ V} · identity (G I_{ V}) =
identity (F I_{ V})
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
   · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm)
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

α: F ⟹ G

ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
α I_{ V} =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm

Fm: fmonoidal V W F

ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α

pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G

ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
α I_{ V} =
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm · α I_{ V})

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α

pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm · α I_{ V}
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm · α I_{ V} = α I_{ V}

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm · α I_{ V} = ?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
?b = α I_{ V}

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm · α I_{ V} = ?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm = ?f'

          apply  (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (_,,fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
identity (F I_{ V}) · α I_{ V} = α I_{ V}

        apply id_left.
      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
(λ gg : nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V} -->[
        inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso I_{ V})] dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal},
 gg ;; smonoidal_preserves_unit V
         dialgebra_disp_monoidal
         monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data =
 transportb
   (mor_disp (nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V})
      (nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V}))
   (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv (identity_z_iso I_{ V}))
   (id_disp (nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V}))
 × smonoidal_preserves_unit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data ;; gg =
   transportb
     (mor_disp dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal}
        dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal})
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (identity_z_iso I_{ V}))
     (id_disp dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal}))
  ((internal_paths_rew_r (B ⟦ G I_{ V}, G I_{ V} ⟧)
      ((# G)%cat (identity I_{ V}))
      (identity (G I_{ V}))
      (λ p : B ⟦ G I_{ V}, G I_{ V} ⟧,
       α I_{ V} · p =
       (# F)%cat (identity I_{ V})
       · (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
          · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm))
      (internal_paths_rew_r (B ⟦ F I_{ V}, F I_{ V} ⟧)
         ((# F)%cat (identity I_{ V}))
         (identity (F I_{ V}))
         (λ p : B ⟦ F I_{ V}, F I_{ V} ⟧,
          α I_{ V} · identity (G I_{ V}) =
          p
          · (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
             · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm))
         (internal_paths_rew_r
            (B ⟦ F I_{ V}, G I_{ V} ⟧)
            (identity (F I_{ V})
             · (pr1
                  (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
                · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm))
            (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
             · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm)
            (λ p : B ⟦ F I_{ V}, G I_{ V} ⟧,
             α I_{ V} · identity (G I_{ V}) = p)
            (internal_paths_rew_r
               (B ⟦ F I_{ V}, G I_{ V} ⟧)
               (α I_{ V} · identity (G I_{ V}))
               (α I_{ V})
               (λ p : B ⟦ F I_{ V}, G I_{ V} ⟧,
                p =
                pr1
                  (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
                · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm)
               (internal_paths_rew
                  (B ⟦ I_{ W}, G I_{ V} ⟧)
                  (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
                   · α I_{ V})
                  (λ p : B ⟦ I_{ W}, G I_{ V} ⟧,
                   α I_{ V} =
                   pr1
                     (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                        Fm) · p)
                  (internal_paths_rew_r
                     (B ⟦ F I_{ V}, G I_{ V} ⟧)
                     (pr1
                        (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                           Fm)
                      · (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
                         · α I_{ V}))
                     (pr1
                        (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                           Fm)
                      · fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
                      · α I_{ V})
                     (λ p : B ⟦ F I_{ V}, G I_{ V} ⟧,
                      α I_{ V} = p)
                     (! (cancel_postcomposition
                           (pr1
                              (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                                 Fm)
                            · fmonoidal_preservesunit
                                Fm)
                           (identity (F I_{ V}))
                           (α I_{ V})
                           (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
                              (fmonoidal_preservesunit
                                 Fm,,
                               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                                 Fm)) @
                         id_left (α I_{ V})))
                     (assoc
                        (pr1
                           (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                              Fm))
                        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm)
                        (α I_{ V})))
                  (fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm)
                  ismnt_unit) (id_right (α I_{ V})))
            (id_left
               (pr1
                  (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
                · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm)))
         (functor_id F I_{ V})) (functor_id G I_{ V})
    :
    α I_{ V} · (# G)%cat (identity I_{ V}) =
    (# F)%cat (identity I_{ V}) · dialgebra_disp_unit)
   :
   nat_trans_to_section F G α I_{ V} -->[
   inv_from_z_iso (identity_z_iso I_{ V})] dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal})
 split; apply base_disp_cells_isaprop.
    Qed.

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (nat_trans_to_section F G α)

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (nat_trans_to_section F G α)

      
A, B: category

W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G

ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal_lax V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (nat_trans_to_section F G α)
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
(λ ms : smonoidal_lax V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
          (nat_trans_to_section F G α),
 smonoidal_stronglaws V dialgebra_disp_monoidal ms)
  ?pr1

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal_lax V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (nat_trans_to_section F G α)
 exact (monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data,,monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_laws).
      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
(λ ms : smonoidal_lax V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
          (nat_trans_to_section F G α),
 smonoidal_stronglaws V dialgebra_disp_monoidal ms)
  (monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data,,
   monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_laws)
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal_strongtensor V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (smonoidal_preserves_tensor V
     dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     (monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data,,
      monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_laws))
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal_strongunit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (smonoidal_preserves_unit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     (monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data,,
      monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_laws))

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal_strongtensor V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (smonoidal_preserves_tensor V
     dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     (monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data,,
      monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_laws))
 exact monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_strongtensor.
        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
ismnt_tensor:= pr1 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit:= pr2 ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
smonoidal_strongunit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (smonoidal_preserves_unit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
     (monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data,,
      monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_laws))
 exact monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_strongunit.
    Defined.

  End IntoMonoidalSection.

  Section FromMonoidalSection.

    Context (sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)).
    Context (ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd).

    Definition nattrans_from_ms : F ⟹ G := section_to_nat_trans F G sd.

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm nattrans_from_ms

    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm nattrans_from_ms

sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm nattrans_from_ms

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· nattrans_from_ms (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
nattrans_from_ms a ⊗^{ W} nattrans_from_ms a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: sd a ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} sd a' -->[
identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')] sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· nattrans_from_ms (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
nattrans_from_ms a ⊗^{ W} nattrans_from_ms a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (sd a) (sd a') · (# G)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) =
(# F)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) · sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· nattrans_from_ms (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
nattrans_from_ms a ⊗^{ W} nattrans_from_ms a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' · (# G)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) =
(# F)%cat (identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')) · sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· nattrans_from_ms (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
nattrans_from_ms a ⊗^{ W} nattrans_from_ms a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' · identity (G (a ⊗_{ V} a')) =
identity (F (a ⊗_{ V} a')) · sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· nattrans_from_ms (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
nattrans_from_ms a ⊗^{ W} nattrans_from_ms a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· nattrans_from_ms (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
nattrans_from_ms a ⊗^{ W} nattrans_from_ms a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· section_to_nat_trans F G sd (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
section_to_nat_trans F G sd a
⊗^{ W} section_to_nat_trans F G sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· (pr11 sd) (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
(pr11 sd) a ⊗^{ W} (pr11 sd) a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· (pr11 sd) (a ⊗_{ V} a') = ?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
?b =
(pr11 sd) a ⊗^{ W} (pr11 sd) a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· (pr11 sd) (a ⊗_{ V} a') = ?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
(pr11 sd) (a ⊗_{ V} a') = ?t2

          apply pathsinv0, aux. 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
   · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a') =
(pr11 sd) a ⊗^{ W} (pr11 sd) a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

a, a': A

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
· sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' =
(pr11 sd) a ⊗^{ W} (pr11 sd) a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a'

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
· sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a' = (pr11 sd) a ⊗^{ W} (pr11 sd) a'

a, a': A

· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')
· sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a' = ?b

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') =
?f'

          apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_,,fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a')). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
a, a': A
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm a a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a' = sd (a ⊗_{ V} a')
identity (F a ⊗_{ W} F a') · sd a ⊗^{ W} sd a' =
(pr11 sd) a ⊗^{ W} (pr11 sd) a'

        apply id_left.
      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm nattrans_from_ms

F, G: A ⟶ B

is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm nattrans_from_ms

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: section_preserves_unit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm nattrans_from_ms

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: dialgebra_disp_unit · (# G)%cat (identity I_{ V}) =
(# F)%cat (identity I_{ V}) · sd I_{ V}
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm nattrans_from_ms

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· (# G)%cat (identity I_{ V}) = (# F)%cat (identity I_{ V}) · sd I_{ V}
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm nattrans_from_ms

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· identity (G I_{ V}) = identity (F I_{ V}) · sd I_{ V}
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm nattrans_from_ms

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
sd I_{ V}
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm nattrans_from_ms

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
sd I_{ V}
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm · nattrans_from_ms I_{ V} =
?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
sd I_{ V}
?b = fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm

aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =

fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm · nattrans_from_ms I_{ V} =

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
sd I_{ V}
nattrans_from_ms I_{ V} = ?t2

          apply pathsinv0, aux. 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
sd I_{ V}
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
   · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm

sd I_{ V}
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm

fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm = ?b

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
sd I_{ V}
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) = ?f'

          apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso (_,,fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
aux: pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
sd I_{ V}
identity I_{ W} · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm

        apply id_left.
    Qed.

  End FromMonoidalSection.

  (** the following lemma should be instance of a construction with lifting *)
  
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Gm)
  (dialgebra_nat_trans F G)

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
is_mon_nat_trans
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Gm)
  (dialgebra_nat_trans F G)

is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Gm)

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
fmonoidal_preservestensordata
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Fm) a a'
· dialgebra_nat_trans F G
    (a ⊗_{ dialgebra_monoidal} a') =
dialgebra_nat_trans F G a
⊗^{ W} dialgebra_nat_trans F G a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata
    (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Gm) a
    a'

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
pr1 (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Fm) a
  a'
· dialgebra_nat_trans F G
    (a ⊗_{ dialgebra_monoidal} a') =
dialgebra_nat_trans F G a
⊗^{ W} dialgebra_nat_trans F G a'
· pr1 (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Gm) a
    a'
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
· (# F)%cat
    (projection_preserves_tensordata
       dialgebra_disp_monoidal a a')
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (pr2 a) (pr2 a') =
dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G a
⊗^{ W} dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G a'
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
   · (# G)%cat
       (projection_preserves_tensordata
          dialgebra_disp_monoidal a a'))

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
pr1 Fm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
· (# F)%cat
    (projection_preserves_tensordata
       dialgebra_disp_monoidal a a')
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (pr2 a) (pr2 a') =
dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G a
⊗^{ W} dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G a'
· (pr1 Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
   · (# G)%cat
       (projection_preserves_tensordata
          dialgebra_disp_monoidal a a'))

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
pr1 Fm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
· (# F)%cat
    (identity
       (pr1_category base_disp
          (a
           ⊗_{ total_monoidal dialgebra_disp_monoidal} a')))
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (pr2 a) (pr2 a') =
dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G a
⊗^{ W} dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G a'
· (pr1 Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
   · (# G)%cat
       (identity
          (pr1_category base_disp
             (a
              ⊗_{ total_monoidal
                    dialgebra_disp_monoidal} a'))))

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
pr1 Fm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
· (# F)%cat (identity (pr1 a ⊗_{ V} pr1 a'))
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (pr2 a) (pr2 a') =
dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G a
⊗^{ W} dialgebra_nat_trans_data F G a'
· (pr1 Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
   · (# G)%cat (identity (pr1 a ⊗_{ V} pr1 a')))

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
pr1 Fm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
· (# F)%cat (identity (pr1 a ⊗_{ V} pr1 a'))
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (pr2 a) (pr2 a') =
pr2 a ⊗^{ W} pr2 a'
· (pr1 Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
   · (# G)%cat (identity (pr1 a ⊗_{ V} pr1 a')))

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
pr1 Fm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
· identity (F (pr1 a ⊗_{ V} pr1 a'))
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (pr2 a) (pr2 a') =
pr2 a ⊗^{ W} pr2 a'
· (pr1 Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
   · identity (G (pr1 a ⊗_{ V} pr1 a')))

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
pr1 Fm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op (pr2 a) (pr2 a') =
pr2 a ⊗^{ W} pr2 a' · pr1 Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
pr1 Fm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')
· (pr1
     (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (pr1 a)
        (pr1 a')) · pr2 a ⊗^{ W} pr2 a'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')) =
pr2 a ⊗^{ W} pr2 a' · pr1 Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')

W: monoidal B

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G

   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')) =

W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
?b = pr2 a ⊗^{ W} pr2 a' · pr1 Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')

· pr1

        apply (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (pr1 a) (pr1 a'))). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
identity (F (pr1 a) ⊗_{ W} F (pr1 a'))
· pr2 a ⊗^{ W} pr2 a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a') =
pr2 a ⊗^{ W} pr2 a' · pr1 Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
a, a': dialgebra F G
pr2 a ⊗^{ W} pr2 a'
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a') =
pr2 a ⊗^{ W} pr2 a' · pr1 Gm (pr1 a) (pr1 a')

      apply idpath.
    
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Gm)
  (dialgebra_nat_trans F G)
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Fm)
· dialgebra_nat_trans F G I_{ dialgebra_monoidal} =
fmonoidal_preservesunit
  (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Gm)

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
pr2 (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Fm)
· dialgebra_nat_trans F G I_{ dialgebra_monoidal} =
pr2 (comp_fmonoidal_lax dialgebra_monoidal_pr1 Gm)
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· (# F)%cat
    (projection_preserves_unit dialgebra_disp_monoidal)
· dialgebra_disp_unit =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· (# G)%cat
    (projection_preserves_unit dialgebra_disp_monoidal)

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
pr2 Fm
· (# F)%cat
    (projection_preserves_unit dialgebra_disp_monoidal)
· dialgebra_disp_unit =
pr2 Gm
· (# G)%cat
    (projection_preserves_unit dialgebra_disp_monoidal)

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
pr2 Fm
· (# F)%cat
    (identity
       (pr1_category base_disp
          I_{ total_monoidal dialgebra_disp_monoidal}))
· dialgebra_disp_unit =
pr2 Gm
· (# G)%cat
    (identity
       (pr1_category base_disp
          I_{ total_monoidal dialgebra_disp_monoidal}))

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
pr2 Fm · (# F)%cat (identity I_{ V})
· dialgebra_disp_unit =
pr2 Gm · (# G)%cat (identity I_{ V})

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
pr2 Fm · (# F)%cat (identity I_{ V})
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
   · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm) =
pr2 Gm · (# G)%cat (identity I_{ V})

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
pr2 Fm · identity (F I_{ V})
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
   · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm) =
pr2 Gm · identity (G I_{ V})

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
pr2 Fm
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
   · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm) = pr2 Gm

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

Fm: fmonoidal V W F

pr2 Fm
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
   · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm) = ?b
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
?b = pr2 Gm

      
A, B: category

W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
pr2 Fm
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
pr2 Fm · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm = ?b
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
pr2 Fm · pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) =

        apply (pr12 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)). 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
identity I_{ W} · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm = pr2 Gm

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
identity I_{ W} · pr2 Gm = pr2 Gm

      apply id_left.
  Qed.


  Section RoundtripForSDData.

      Local Definition source_type: UU := ∑ α : F ⟹ G, is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α.
      Local Definition target_type: UU := ∑ sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G),
            smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd.

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
source_type → target_type

V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
source_type → target_type

ass: source_type

ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α

Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt: is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α
smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal
  (nat_trans_to_section F G α)

        exact (monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data α ismnt).
      Defined.

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B

Fm: fmonoidal V W F

sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm (nattrans_from_ms sd)

        exact (nattrans_from_ms_is_mon_nat_trans sd ms).
      Defined.

      
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
target_to_source
  (source_to_target (α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit)) =
α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit

        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
pr1
  (target_to_source
     (source_to_target (α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit))) =
pr1 (α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit)
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
transportf (is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm) 
  ?p
  (pr2
     (target_to_source
        (source_to_target
           (α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit)))) =
pr2 (α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit)

  (target_to_source
     (source_to_target (α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit))) =

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
nattrans_from_ms (nat_trans_to_section F G α) = α

          
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
section_to_nat_trans F G (nat_trans_to_section F G α) =
α

          apply UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Dialgebras.roundtrip1_with_sections.
        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
transportf (is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm)
  ((Dialgebras.roundtrip1_with_sections F G α
    :
    nattrans_from_ms (nat_trans_to_section F G α) = α)
   :
   pr1
     (target_to_source
        (source_to_target
           (α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit))) =
   pr1 (α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit))
  (pr2
     (target_to_source
        (source_to_target
           (α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit)))) =
pr2 (α,, ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit)
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
transportf (is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm)
  (Dialgebras.roundtrip1_with_sections F G α)
  (nattrans_from_ms_is_mon_nat_trans
     (nat_trans_to_section F G α)
     (monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data α
        (ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit))) =
ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit

goaltype:= is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α: UU
transportf (is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm)
  (Dialgebras.roundtrip1_with_sections F G α)
  (nattrans_from_ms_is_mon_nat_trans
     (nat_trans_to_section F G α)
     (monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data α
        (ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit))) =
ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit

ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
goaltype:= is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α: UU

        (ismnt_tensor,, ismnt_unit))) =

 apply Hprop.

A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
goaltype:= is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α: UU
∏ t : A,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ a' : A,
   fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm t a'
   · α (t ⊗_{ V} a') =
   α t ⊗^{ W} α a'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm t a')
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
goaltype:= is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α: UU
a: A
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ a' : A,
   fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
   · α (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
   α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a')

            
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
goaltype:= is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α: UU
a: A
∏ t : A,
isofhlevel 1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a t
   · α (a ⊗_{ V} t) =
   α a ⊗^{ W} α t
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a t)
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
goaltype:= is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α: UU
a, a': A
isofhlevel 1
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm a a'
   · α (a ⊗_{ V} a') =
   α a ⊗^{ W} α a'
   · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm a a')

            apply B.
          
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
α: F ⟹ G
ismnt_tensor: is_mon_nat_trans_tensorlaw Fm Gm α
ismnt_unit: is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α
goaltype:= is_mon_nat_trans Fm Gm α: UU
isaprop (is_mon_nat_trans_unitlaw Fm Gm α)
 apply B.
      Qed.

sd,, ms

pr1 (sd,, ms)

transportf (smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal)
  ?p
  (pr2 (source_to_target (target_to_source (sd,, ms)))) =
pr2 (sd,, ms)

nat_trans_to_section F G (nattrans_from_ms sd) = sd

          
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B

ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd

          apply UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Dialgebras.roundtrip2_with_sections.
        
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
transportf (smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal)
  ((Dialgebras.roundtrip2_with_sections F G sd
    :
    nat_trans_to_section F G (nattrans_from_ms sd) =
    sd)
   :
   pr1 (source_to_target (target_to_source (sd,, ms))) =
   pr1 (sd,, ms))
  (pr2 (source_to_target (target_to_source (sd,, ms)))) =
pr2 (sd,, ms)

transportf (smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal)
  (Dialgebras.roundtrip2_with_sections F G sd)
  (monnattrans_to_monoidal_section_data
     (nattrans_from_ms sd)
     (nattrans_from_ms_is_mon_nat_trans sd ms)) = ms
