isaprop
  (∏ x y : A,
   sd x ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} sd y -->[
   identity (x ⊗_{ V} y)] sd (x ⊗_{ V} y))

            
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
goaltype:= smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd: UU
∏ t : A,
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ y : A,
   sd t ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} sd y -->[
   identity (t ⊗_{ V} y)] sd (t ⊗_{ V} y))
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
goaltype:= smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd: UU
a: A
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ y : A,
   sd a ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} sd y -->[
   identity (a ⊗_{ V} y)] sd (a ⊗_{ V} y))

            
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
goaltype:= smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd: UU
a: A
∏ t : A,
isofhlevel 1
  (sd a ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} sd t -->[
   identity (a ⊗_{ V} t)] sd (a ⊗_{ V} t))
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
goaltype:= smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd: UU
a, a': A
isofhlevel 1
  (sd a ⊗⊗_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} sd a' -->[
   identity (a ⊗_{ V} a')] sd (a ⊗_{ V} a'))

            apply base_disp_cells_isaprop.
          
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
goaltype:= smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd: UU
isaprop
  (section_preserves_unit V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd)
 
A, B: category
V: monoidal A
W: monoidal B
F, G: A ⟶ B
Fm: fmonoidal V W F
Gm: fmonoidal_lax V W G
sd: section_disp (dialgebra_disp_cat F G)
ms: smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd
goaltype:= smonoidal_data V dialgebra_disp_monoidal sd: UU
isaprop
  (dI_{ dialgebra_disp_monoidal} -->[
   identity I_{ V}] sd I_{ V})

            apply base_disp_cells_isaprop.
      Qed.

  End RoundtripForSDData.

End FixTwoMonoidalFunctors.

Section MonoidalNatTransToDialgebraLifting.

  Context {C1 C2 C3 : category}
          {M1 : monoidal C1}
          {M2 : monoidal C2}
          {M3 : monoidal C3}
          {F G : C2 ⟶ C3}
          {Fm : fmonoidal M2 M3 F}
          {Gm : fmonoidal M2 M3 G}
          {K : C1 ⟶ C2}
          {Km : fmonoidal M1 M2 K}
          {α : K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G}
          (αm : is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm) (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α).

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
flmonoidal_data Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
flmonoidal_data Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
fl_preserves_tensor_data Km
  (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
(λ _ : fl_preserves_tensor_data Km
         (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
         (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α),
 fl_preserves_unit Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
   (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)) ?pr1

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
fl_preserves_tensor_data Km
  (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
 
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
disp_bifunctor_on_objects
  (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y) -->[
fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y] nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting
                                        K α
                                        (bifunctor_on_objects
                                           M1 x y)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y)
· (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))
· functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x) (K y)
· (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))
· (functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y)
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x) (K y)
      · (# G)%cat
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y))) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))
· (functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y)
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x) (K y)
      · (# G)%cat
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y))) =
?b
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
?b =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)
 
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))
· (functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y)
   · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x) (K y)
      · (# G)%cat
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y))) =
?b

        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y)
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x) (K y)
   · (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)) =
?t2

        exact (! pr1 αm x y).
      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
     (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm) x y
   · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (K x) (K y)
   · (# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
   · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)


      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (K x) (K y)
   · (# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
   · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) = ?b
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
?b =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)
 
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))
· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (K x) (K y)
   · (# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
   · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) = ?b

        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (K x) (K y)
· (# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) = ?b

        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (K x) (K y) = ?y'

        apply (pr2 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x) (K y))).
      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
identity (F (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x) (K y)))
· (# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
identity (F (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x) (K y)))
· ((# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
   · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)

      apply id_left.
    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
(λ _ : fl_preserves_tensor_data Km
         (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
         (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α),
 fl_preserves_unit Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
   (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α))
  ((λ x y : C1,
    (internal_paths_rew_r
       (C3 ⟦ F (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x) (K y)),
        G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) ⟧)
       (pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x)
             (K y))
        · functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y)
        · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x) (K y)
        · (# G)%cat
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y))
       (pr1
          (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm (K x)
             (K y))
        · functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y)
        · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x)
             (K y)
           · (# G)%cat
               (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)))
       (λ p : C3
              ⟦ F
                  (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x) (K y)),
              G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) ⟧,
        p =
        (# F)%cat
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
        · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
       (internal_paths_rew_r
          (C3
           ⟦ F (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x) (K y)),
           G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) ⟧)
          (pr1
             (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                (K x) (K y))
           · functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y)
           · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x)
                (K y)
              · (# G)%cat
                  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
                     y)))
          (pr1
             (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                (K x) (K y))
           · (functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y)
              · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm
                   (K x) (K y)
                 · (# G)%cat
                     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km
                        x y))))
          (λ p : C3
                 ⟦ F
                     (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x)
                        (K y)),
                 G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) ⟧,
           p =
           (# F)%cat
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
           · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
          (maponpaths
             (compose
                (pr1
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                      Fm (K x) (K y)))) (! pr1 αm x y) @
           (internal_paths_rew_r
              (C3
               ⟦ F
                   (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x)
                      (K y)),
               G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) ⟧)
              (pr1
                 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                    (K x) (K y))
               · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm
                    (K x) (K y)
                  · (# F)%cat
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         Km x y)
                  · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
              (pr1
                 (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                    (K x) (K y))
               · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm
                    (K x) (K y)
                  · (# F)%cat
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         Km x y))
               · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
              (λ p : C3
                     ⟦ F
                         (bifunctor_on_objects M2
                            (K x) (K y)),
                     G
                       (K
                          (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
                     ⟧,
               p =
               identity
                 (F (bifunctor_on_objects M2 ... ...))
               · (# F)%cat
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
                      y)
               · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
              (internal_paths_rew_r
                 (C3
                  ⟦ F
                      (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x)
                         (K y)),
                  F (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
                  ⟧)
                 (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       Fm (K x) (K y))
                  · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm
                       (K x) (K y)
                     · (# F)%cat
                         (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                            Km x y)))
                 (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       Fm (K x) (K y))
                  · fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm
                      (K x) (K y)
                  · (# F)%cat
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         Km x y))
                 (λ p : C3
                        ⟦ F
                            (bifunctor_on_objects M2
                               (...) (...)),
                        F (K (...)) ⟧,
                  p · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) =
                  identity (F ...)
                  · (# F)%cat
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         Km x y)
                  · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
                 (maponpaths_2 compose
                    (maponpaths_2 compose
                       (let X := pr22 (...) in X)
                       ((# F)%cat
                          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                             Km x y)))
                    (α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
                 (assoc
                    (pr1
                       (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                          Fm (K x) (K y)))
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm
                       (K x) (K y))
                    ((# F)%cat
                       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                          Km x y))))
              (assoc
                 (pr1
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       Fm (K x) (K y)))
                 (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm
                    (K x) (K y)
                  · (# F)%cat
                      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                         Km x y))
                 (α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))) @
            internal_paths_rew_r
              (C3
               ⟦ F
                   (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x)
                      (K y)),
               G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) ⟧)
              (identity
                 (F
                    (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x)
                       (K y)))
               · (# F)%cat
                   (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
                      y)
               · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
              (identity
                 (F
                    (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x)
                       (K y)))
               · ((# F)%cat
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km
                       x y)
                  · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
              (λ p : C3
                     ⟦ F
                         (bifunctor_on_objects M2
                            (K x) (K y)),
                     G
                       (K
                          (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
                     ⟧,
               p =
               (# F)%cat
                 (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
               · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
              (id_left
                 ((# F)%cat
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km
                       x y)
                  · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
              (assoc'
                 (identity
                    (F
                       (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x)
                          (K y))))
                 ((# F)%cat
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km
                       x y))
                 (α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
            :
            pr1
              (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                 (K x) (K y))
            · (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                 (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm) x y
               · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) =
            (# F)%cat
              (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
            · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
          (assoc'
             (pr1
                (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                   (K x) (K y)))
             (functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y))
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x)
                (K y)
              · (# G)%cat
                  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
                     y))))
       (assoc'
          (pr1
             (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly Fm
                (K x) (K y))
           · functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y))
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x)
             (K y))
          ((# G)%cat
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)))
     :
     dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y)
     · (# G)%cat
         (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y) =
     (# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
     · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
    :
    disp_bifunctor_on_objects
      (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y) -->[
    fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y] nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting
                                            K α
                                            (bifunctor_on_objects
                                               M1 x y))
   :
   fl_preserves_tensor_data Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α))
 
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm
· (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)
· α (monoidal_unit M1)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)
· α (monoidal_unit M1)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3

α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km) = ?b

  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
?b =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)
· α (monoidal_unit M1)

C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2

  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km) = ?t2

        exact (! pr2 αm).

  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm = ?y'

        apply (pr2 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)).
      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
identity (F (monoidal_unit M2))
· (# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)
· α (monoidal_unit M1) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)
· α (monoidal_unit M1)

α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
identity (F (monoidal_unit M2))
· ((# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)
   · α (monoidal_unit M1)) =
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)
· α (monoidal_unit M1)

      apply id_left.
  Qed.

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1

α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
flmonoidal_laxlaws Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
  monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_data

  
C1, C2, C3: category

M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3

α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G

  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
flmonoidal_laxlaws Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
  monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_data

    repeat split ; intro ; intros ; apply homset_property.
  Qed.

flmonoidal_laxlaws Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
  monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_data

    exact monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_laxlaws.
  Defined.

  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
  monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting (pr2 Km)

  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
fl_strongtensor Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
  (flmonoidal_preserves_tensor_data Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
     monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting)
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))

  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
fl_strongunit Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
  (flmonoidal_preserves_unit Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
     monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting)
  (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))

  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
fl_strongtensor Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
  (flmonoidal_preserves_tensor_data Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
     monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting)
  (fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))
 
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
is_z_iso_disp
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)
  (flmonoidal_preserves_tensor_data Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
     monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting x y)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
  (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)] 
disp_bifunctor_on_objects
  (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y)
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
(λ gg : nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
          (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) -->[
        inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)] disp_bifunctor_on_objects
                                   (dialgebra_disp_monoidal
                                      Fm Gm) (K x)
                                   (K y)
                                   (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting
                                      K α x)
                                   (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting
                                      K α y),
 gg ;; flmonoidal_preserves_tensor_data Km
         (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
         (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
         monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting x y =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
   (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)
         x y))
   (id_disp
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
 × flmonoidal_preserves_tensor_data Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
     monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting x y ;; gg =
   transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_bifunctor_on_objects
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y))
        (disp_bifunctor_on_objects
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y)))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (Km,, pr2 Km) x y))
     (id_disp
        (disp_bifunctor_on_objects
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y))))
  ?pr1

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
  (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)] 
disp_bifunctor_on_objects
  (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y)
 
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)
· (# G)%cat
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
          (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)) =
(# F)%cat
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)
        x y))
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y)


        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
is_z_isomorphism
  ((# G)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)))
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pfG_is_z_iso:= ?Goal0: is_z_isomorphism
  ((# G)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
           Km x y,,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)))
α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)
· (# G)%cat
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
          (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)) =
(# F)%cat
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)
        x y))
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y)

is_z_isomorphism

M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3

K: C1 ⟶ C2

α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
is_z_isomorphism
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y))

          apply is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso.
        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F

α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pfG_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism G
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
        y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# G)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
           Km x y,,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)))
α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)
· (# G)%cat
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
          (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)) =
(# F)%cat
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)
        x y))
· dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y)

          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),, pfG_is_z_iso)

           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly

  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α

  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
        y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)): is_z_isomorphism

(# F)%cat
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)
        x y))
· (dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       ((# G)%cat
          (inv_from_z_iso
             (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
              fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),, pfG_is_z_iso))

        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
pfG_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism G
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
        y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# G)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
           Km x y,,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)))
pfF_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
        y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
           Km x y,,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)))
inv_from_z_iso
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),, pfF_is_z_iso)
· α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) =
dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y)
· inv_from_z_iso
    ((# G)%cat
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),, pfG_is_z_iso)

        exact (! pr1 monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_data x y).
      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
(λ gg : nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
          (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) -->[
        inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)] disp_bifunctor_on_objects
                                   (dialgebra_disp_monoidal
                                      Fm Gm) (K x)
                                   (K y)
                                   (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting
                                      K α x)
                                   (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting
                                      K α y),
 gg ;; flmonoidal_preserves_tensor_data Km
         (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
         (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
         monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting x y =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
   (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)
         x y))
   (id_disp
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
 × flmonoidal_preserves_tensor_data Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
     monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting x y ;; gg =
   transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_bifunctor_on_objects
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y))
        (disp_bifunctor_on_objects
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y)))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (Km,, pr2 Km) x y))
     (id_disp
        (disp_bifunctor_on_objects
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y))))
  ((let pfG_is_z_iso :=
      functor_on_is_z_isomorphism G
        (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)) in
    z_iso_inv_to_right
      (F (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
      (G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
      (G (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x) (K y)))
      (α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
      ((# G)%cat
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
               (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),, pfG_is_z_iso)
      ((# F)%cat
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
               (Km,, pr2 Km) x y))
       · dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y))
      (let pfF_is_z_iso :=
         functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
           (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
               fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                 (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)) in
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C3 ⟦ F (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)),
          G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) ⟧)
         ((# F)%cat
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
                fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  (Km,, pr2 Km) x y))
          · dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y)
          · inv_from_z_iso
              ((# G)%cat
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km
                       x y,,
                     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),,
               pfG_is_z_iso))
         ((# F)%cat
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
                fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  (Km,, pr2 Km) x y))
          · (dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x)
               (α y)
             · inv_from_z_iso
                 ((# G)%cat
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                          Km x y,,
                        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                          (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),,
                  pfG_is_z_iso)))
         (λ p : C3
                ⟦ F (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)),
                G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) ⟧,
          α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) = p)
         (z_iso_inv_to_left
            (F (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
            (F (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x) (K y)))
            (G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
            ((# F)%cat
               (inv_from_z_iso
                  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
                     y,,
                   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                     (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),,
             pfF_is_z_iso)
            (dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x)
               (α y)
             · inv_from_z_iso
                 ((# G)%cat
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                          Km x y,,
                        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                          (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),,
                  pfG_is_z_iso))
            (α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
            (! pr1
                 monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_data
                 x y))
         (assoc'
            ((# F)%cat
               (inv_from_z_iso
                  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
                     y,,
                   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                     (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)))
            (dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x)
               (α y))
            (inv_from_z_iso
               ((# G)%cat
                  (inv_from_z_iso
                     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km
                        x y,,
                      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),,
                pfG_is_z_iso)))))
   :
   nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
     (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) -->[
   inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)
        x y)] disp_bifunctor_on_objects
                (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x)
                (K y)
                (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
                (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y))
 
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
x, y: C1
(λ gg : nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
          (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) -->[
        inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
           fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
             (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)] disp_bifunctor_on_objects
                                   (dialgebra_disp_monoidal
                                      Fm Gm) (K x)
                                   (K y)
                                   (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting
                                      K α x)
                                   (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting
                                      K α y),
 gg ;; flmonoidal_preserves_tensor_data Km
         (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
         (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
         monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting x y =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
   (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
      (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
       fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)
         x y))
   (id_disp
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
 × flmonoidal_preserves_tensor_data Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
     monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting x y ;; gg =
   transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_bifunctor_on_objects
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y))
        (disp_bifunctor_on_objects
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y)))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
         fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
           (Km,, pr2 Km) x y))
     (id_disp
        (disp_bifunctor_on_objects
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
           (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y))))
  ((let pfG_is_z_iso :=
      functor_on_is_z_isomorphism G
        (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
            fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
              (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)) in
    z_iso_inv_to_right
      (F (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
      (G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
      (G (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x) (K y)))
      (α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
      ((# G)%cat
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
               (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),, pfG_is_z_iso)
      ((# F)%cat
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
             fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
               (Km,, pr2 Km) x y))
       · dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y))
      (let pfF_is_z_iso :=
         functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
           (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
               fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                 (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)) in
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C3 ⟦ F (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)),
          G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) ⟧)
         ((# F)%cat
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
                fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  (Km,, pr2 Km) x y))
          · dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x) (α y)
          · inv_from_z_iso
              ((# G)%cat
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km
                       x y,,
                     fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                       (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),,
               pfG_is_z_iso))
         ((# F)%cat
            (inv_from_z_iso
               (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
                fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                  (Km,, pr2 Km) x y))
          · (dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x)
               (α y)
             · inv_from_z_iso
                 ((# G)%cat
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                          Km x y,,
                        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                          (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),,
                  pfG_is_z_iso)))
         (λ p : C3
                ⟦ F (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)),
                G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)) ⟧,
          α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) = p)
         (z_iso_inv_to_left
            (F (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
            (F (bifunctor_on_objects M2 (K x) (K y)))
            (G (K (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y)))
            ((# F)%cat
               (inv_from_z_iso
                  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
                     y,,
                   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                     (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),,
             pfF_is_z_iso)
            (dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x)
               (α y)
             · inv_from_z_iso
                 ((# G)%cat
                    (inv_from_z_iso
                       (fmonoidal_preservestensordata
                          Km x y,,
                        fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                          (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),,
                  pfG_is_z_iso))
            (α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y))
            (! pr1
                 monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_data
                 x y))
         (assoc'
            ((# F)%cat
               (inv_from_z_iso
                  (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x
                     y,,
                   fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                     (Km,, pr2 Km) x y)))
            (dialgebra_disp_tensor_op Fm Gm (α x)
               (α y))
            (inv_from_z_iso
               ((# G)%cat
                  (inv_from_z_iso
                     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km
                        x y,,
                      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly
                        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km) x y)),,
                pfG_is_z_iso)))))
   :
   nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
     (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) -->[
   inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y,,
      fmonoidal_preservestensorstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)
        x y)] disp_bifunctor_on_objects
                (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x)
                (K y)
                (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α x)
                (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α y))

        split ; apply base_disp_cells_isaprop.
    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
fl_strongunit Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
  (flmonoidal_preserves_unit Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
     monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting)
  (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))
 
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α (monoidal_unit M1) -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))] 
disp_monoidal_unit (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
(λ gg : nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
          (monoidal_unit M1) -->[
        inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
             (Km,, pr2 Km))] disp_monoidal_unit
                               (dialgebra_disp_monoidal
                                  Fm Gm),
 gg ;; flmonoidal_preserves_unit Km
         (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
         (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
         monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (monoidal_unit M1))
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (monoidal_unit M1)))
   (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
      (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
       fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)))
   (id_disp
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (monoidal_unit M1)))
 × flmonoidal_preserves_unit Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
     monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting ;; gg =
   transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_monoidal_unit
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm))
        (disp_monoidal_unit
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)))
     (id_disp
        (disp_monoidal_unit
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)))) ?pr1

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α (monoidal_unit M1) -->[
inv_from_z_iso
  (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))] 
disp_monoidal_unit (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
 
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
α (monoidal_unit M1)
· (# G)%cat
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))) =
(# F)%cat
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)))
· dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm


        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pfL_is_z_iso:= ?Goal: is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
α (monoidal_unit M1)
· (# G)%cat
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))) =
(# F)%cat
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)))
· dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm

        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))

          
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
is_z_isomorphism
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km)))

          apply is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso.
        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pfL_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
α (monoidal_unit M1)
· (# G)%cat
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))) =
(# F)%cat
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)))
· dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm


        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pfL_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
inv_from_z_iso
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),, pfL_is_z_iso)
· (α (monoidal_unit M1)
   · (# G)%cat
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
             (Km,, pr2 Km)))) =
dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm


        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pfL_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
is_z_isomorphism
  ((# G)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pfL_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
pfR_is_z_iso:= ?Goal: is_z_isomorphism
  ((# G)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
inv_from_z_iso
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),, pfL_is_z_iso)
· (α (monoidal_unit M1)
   · (# G)%cat
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
             (Km,, pr2 Km)))) =
dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm

is_z_isomorphism

  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α

  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,

  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,

is_z_isomorphism
  (inv_from_z_iso

          apply is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso.

M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pfL_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
pfR_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism G
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# G)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
inv_from_z_iso
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),, pfL_is_z_iso)
· (α (monoidal_unit M1)
   · (# G)%cat
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
             (Km,, pr2 Km)))) =
dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm


        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pfL_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
pfR_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism G
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# G)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
inv_from_z_iso
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),, pfL_is_z_iso)
· α (monoidal_unit M1)
· (# G)%cat
    (inv_from_z_iso
       (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
        fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))) =

C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
pfL_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
pfR_is_z_iso:= functor_on_is_z_isomorphism G
  (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))): is_z_isomorphism
  ((# G)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))))
inv_from_z_iso
  ((# F)%cat
     (inv_from_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
           (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),, pfL_is_z_iso)
· α (monoidal_unit M1) =
dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm
· inv_from_z_iso
    ((# G)%cat
       (inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
             (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),, pfR_is_z_iso)

        exact (! pr2 monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_data).
      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
(λ gg : nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
          (monoidal_unit M1) -->[
        inv_from_z_iso
          (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
           fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
             (Km,, pr2 Km))] disp_monoidal_unit
                               (dialgebra_disp_monoidal
                                  Fm Gm),
 gg ;; flmonoidal_preserves_unit Km
         (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
         (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
         monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting =
 transportb
   (mor_disp
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (monoidal_unit M1))
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (monoidal_unit M1)))
   (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv
      (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
       fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)))
   (id_disp
      (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
         (monoidal_unit M1)))
 × flmonoidal_preserves_unit Km
     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
     (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
     monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting ;; gg =
   transportb
     (mor_disp
        (disp_monoidal_unit
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm))
        (disp_monoidal_unit
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)))
     (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso
        (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
         fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km)))
     (id_disp
        (disp_monoidal_unit
           (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm))))
  ((let pfL_is_z_iso :=
      functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F
        (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
           (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
            fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
              (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))) in
    z_iso_inv_to_left (F (K (monoidal_unit M1)))
      (F (monoidal_unit M2)) (G (monoidal_unit M2))
      ((# F)%cat
         (inv_from_z_iso
            (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
             fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
               (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),, pfL_is_z_iso)
      (dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm)
      (α (monoidal_unit M1)
       · (# G)%cat
           (inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                 (Km,, pr2 Km))))
      (let pfR_is_z_iso :=
         functor_on_is_z_isomorphism G
           (is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso
              (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
               fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                 (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))) in
       internal_paths_rew_r
         (C3 ⟦ F (monoidal_unit M2),
          G (monoidal_unit M2) ⟧)
         (inv_from_z_iso
            ((# F)%cat
               (inv_from_z_iso
                  (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
                   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                     (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),,
             pfL_is_z_iso)
          · (α (monoidal_unit M1)
             · (# G)%cat
                 (inv_from_z_iso
                    (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
                     fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                       (Km,, pr2 Km)))))
         (inv_from_z_iso
            ((# F)%cat
               (inv_from_z_iso
                  (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
                   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                     (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),,
             pfL_is_z_iso) · α (monoidal_unit M1)
          · (# G)%cat
              (inv_from_z_iso
                 (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
                  fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                    (Km,, pr2 Km))))
         (λ p : C3 ⟦ F (monoidal_unit M2),
                G (monoidal_unit M2) ⟧,
          p = dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm)
         (z_iso_inv_to_right (F (monoidal_unit M2))
            (G (K (monoidal_unit M1)))
            (G (monoidal_unit M2))
            (inv_from_z_iso
               ((# F)%cat
                  (inv_from_z_iso
                     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
                      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),,
                pfL_is_z_iso) · α (monoidal_unit M1))
            ((# G)%cat
               (inv_from_z_iso
                  (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
                   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                     (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),,
             pfR_is_z_iso) (dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm)
            (! pr2
                 monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_data))
         (assoc
            (inv_from_z_iso
               ((# F)%cat
                  (inv_from_z_iso
                     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
                      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                        (pr1 Km,, pr2 Km))),,
                pfL_is_z_iso)) (α (monoidal_unit M1))
            ((# G)%cat
               (inv_from_z_iso
                  (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
                   fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly
                     (Km,, pr2 Km)))))))
   :
   nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α
     (monoidal_unit M1) -->[
   inv_from_z_iso
     (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km,,
      fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly (Km,, pr2 Km))] 
   disp_monoidal_unit (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm))
 split ; apply base_disp_cells_isaprop.
  Qed.

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
flmonoidal Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α) (pr2 Km)

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
flmonoidal Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α) (pr2 Km)

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
αm: is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α
fl_stronglaws Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  (nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting K α)
  monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting (pr2 Km)

    exact monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_stronglaws.
  Defined.

  Definition monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra
    : fmonoidal_lax _ _ (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α)
    := functorlifting_fmonoidal_lax _ _ _ monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting.

  Definition monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_strong
    : fmonoidal _ _ (nat_trans_to_dialgebra K α)
    := functorlifting_fmonoidal _ _ _ monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_strong.

End MonoidalNatTransToDialgebraLifting.

Section MonoidalDialgebraLiftingToNatTrans.

  Context {C1 C2 C3 : category}
          {M1 : monoidal C1}
          {M2 : monoidal C2}
          {M3 : monoidal C3}
          {F G : C2 ⟶ C3}
          {Fm : fmonoidal M2 M3 F}
          {Gm : fmonoidal M2 M3 G}
          {K : C1 ⟶ C2}
          {Km : fmonoidal M1 M2 K}
          {fl : functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K}
          (Fl : flmonoidal_lax Km
                               (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
                               fl).

  Let α : K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G := dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans _ fl.

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α

  fl

  (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α

  fl

x, y: C1
fmonoidal_preservestensordata (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm) x
  y · α (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) =
functoronmorphisms1 M3 (α x) (α y)
· fmonoidal_preservestensordata (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm)
    x y

  fl

fmonoidal_preservestensordata Fm (K x) (K y)
· (# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)
· (pr11 fl) (bifunctor_on_objects M1 x y) =

· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x) (K y)
   · (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y))

     (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) (K x) (K y)
     (fl x) (fl y)
   · (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y)) =

· (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Gm (K x) (K y)
   · (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservestensordata Km x y))
