fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· ((# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)
   · (pr11 fl) (monoidal_unit M1)) = ?b

        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
(# F)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)
· (pr11 fl) (monoidal_unit M1) = ?t2

        exact (! pr21 Fl).
      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· (disp_monoidal_unit (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
   · (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)


      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· disp_monoidal_unit (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
· (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
· (# G)%cat (fmonoidal_preservesunit Km)

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· disp_monoidal_unit (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm


      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm · dialgebra_disp_unit Fm Gm =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· (pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
   · fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm) =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm

      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm = ?b
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
?b = fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm
 
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm = ?b

        
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
fmonoidal_preservesunit Fm
· pr1 (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm) = ?y'

        apply  (fmonoidal_preservesunitstrongly Fm).
      
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
fl: functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
Fl: flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm)
  fl
α:= dialgebra_lifting_to_nat_trans K fl: K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G
identity (monoidal_unit M3)
· fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm =
fmonoidal_preservesunit Gm

      apply id_left.
  Qed.

  (* Definition monoidal_dialgebra_lifting_to_invertible_monoidal_nat_trans *)

End MonoidalDialgebraLiftingToNatTrans.

Section RoundtripForLiftingData.

  Context {C1 C2 C3 : category}
          {M1 : monoidal C1}
          {M2 : monoidal C2}
          {M3 : monoidal C3}
          {F G : C2 ⟶ C3}
          {Fm : fmonoidal M2 M3 F}
          {Gm : fmonoidal M2 M3 G}
          {K : C1 ⟶ C2}
          {Km : fmonoidal M1 M2 K}.

  Local Definition source_type': UU
    := ∑ α : K ∙ F ⟹ K ∙ G,
        is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm) (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm) α.

  Local Definition target_type': UU
    := ∑ fl : functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K,
        flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) fl.

  Local Definition target_type_s': UU
    := ∑ fl : functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K,
        flmonoidal Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) fl (pr2 Km).

  Local Definition source_to_target'
    : source_type' -> target_type'
    := λ α, _ ,, monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting (pr2 α).

  Local Definition target_to_source'
    : target_type' -> source_type'
    := λ fl, _ ,, monoidal_dialgebra_lifting_to_monoidal_nat_trans (pr2 fl).

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
source_type' → target_type_s'

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
source_type' → target_type_s'

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: source_type'
target_type_s'

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: source_type'
functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
α: source_type'
(λ fl : functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K,
 flmonoidal Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) fl
   (pr2 Km)) ?pr1

    2: apply (monoidal_nat_trans_to_dialgebra_lifting_strong (pr2 α)).
  Defined.

  Local Definition target_to_source_s'
    : target_type_s' -> source_type'
    := λ fl, _ ,, monoidal_dialgebra_lifting_to_monoidal_nat_trans (pr2 fl).

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
target_to_source' (source_to_target' ass) = ass

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
target_to_source' (source_to_target' ass) = ass

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
pr1 (target_to_source' (source_to_target' ass)) =
pr1 ass
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
transportf
  (is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
     (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm)) ?p
  (pr2 (target_to_source' (source_to_target' ass))) =
pr2 ass

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
pr1 (target_to_source' (source_to_target' ass)) =
pr1 ass
 apply UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Dialgebras.roundtrip1_with_liftings.
    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
transportf
  (is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
     (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm))
  (Dialgebras.roundtrip1_with_liftings K (pr1 ass))
  (pr2 (target_to_source' (source_to_target' ass))) =
pr2 ass
 apply isaprop_is_mon_nat_trans.
  Qed.

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
target_to_source_s' (source_to_target_s' ass) = ass

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
target_to_source_s' (source_to_target_s' ass) = ass

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
pr1 (target_to_source_s' (source_to_target_s' ass)) =
pr1 ass
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
transportf
  (is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
     (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm)) ?p
  (pr2 (target_to_source_s' (source_to_target_s' ass))) =
pr2 ass

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
pr1 (target_to_source_s' (source_to_target_s' ass)) =
pr1 ass
 apply UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Dialgebras.roundtrip1_with_liftings.
    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: source_type'
transportf
  (is_mon_nat_trans (comp_fmonoidal Km Fm)
     (comp_fmonoidal Km Gm))
  (Dialgebras.roundtrip1_with_liftings K (pr1 ass))
  (pr2 (target_to_source_s' (source_to_target_s' ass))) =
pr2 ass
 apply isaprop_is_mon_nat_trans.
  Qed.

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type'
source_to_target' (target_to_source' ass) = ass

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type'
source_to_target' (target_to_source' ass) = ass

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type'
pr1 (source_to_target' (target_to_source' ass)) =
pr1 ass
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type'
transportf
  (flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm))
  ?p (pr2 (source_to_target' (target_to_source' ass))) =
pr2 ass

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type'
pr1 (source_to_target' (target_to_source' ass)) =
pr1 ass
 apply UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Dialgebras.roundtrip2_with_liftings.
    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type'
transportf
  (flmonoidal_lax Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm))
  (Dialgebras.roundtrip2_with_liftings K (pr1 ass))
  (pr2 (source_to_target' (target_to_source' ass))) =
pr2 ass
 use flmonoidal_equality ; intros ; apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type_s'
source_to_target_s' (target_to_source_s' ass) = ass

  
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type_s'
source_to_target_s' (target_to_source_s' ass) = ass

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type_s'
pr1 (source_to_target_s' (target_to_source_s' ass)) =
pr1 ass
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type_s'
transportf
  (λ x : functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K,
   flmonoidal Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) x
     (pr2 Km)) ?p
  (pr2 (source_to_target_s' (target_to_source_s' ass))) =
pr2 ass

    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type_s'
pr1 (source_to_target_s' (target_to_source_s' ass)) =
pr1 ass
 apply UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.Dialgebras.roundtrip2_with_liftings.
    
C1, C2, C3: category
M1: monoidal C1
M2: monoidal C2
M3: monoidal C3
F, G: C2 ⟶ C3
Fm: fmonoidal M2 M3 F
Gm: fmonoidal M2 M3 G
K: C1 ⟶ C2
Km: fmonoidal M1 M2 K
ass: target_type_s'
transportf
  (λ x : functor_lifting (dialgebra_disp_cat F G) K,
   flmonoidal Km (dialgebra_disp_monoidal Fm Gm) x
     (pr2 Km))
  (Dialgebras.roundtrip2_with_liftings K (pr1 ass))
  (pr2 (source_to_target_s' (target_to_source_s' ass))) =
pr2 ass
 use flmonoidal_strong_equality ; intros ; apply homset_property.
  Qed.

End RoundtripForLiftingData.
